project_title: Library Book Borrowing and Reservation System

files.purpose: Project overview, setup instructions, and usage guide
files.content:
# Library Book Borrowing and Reservation System

## Overview
This project is a Flask-based application for managing library book borrowing and reservations.

## Setup Instructions
1. Clone the repository.
2. Install dependencies using `pip install -r requirements.txt`.
3. Run the application using `python app.py`.

## Usage
Access the application at `http://localhost:5000`.

files.purpose: Application entry point with Flask app initialization
files.content:
from flask import Flask
from routes import main_routes

app = Flask(__name__)
app.config['SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI'] = 'sqlite:///library.db'

app.register_blueprint(main_routes)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run(debug=True)  # FR-11: User authentication

from flask_sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemy

db = SQLAlchemy()

class Book(db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    title = db.Column(db.String(100), nullable=False)
    author = db.Column(db.String(100), nullable=False)
    isbn = db.Column(db.String(20), unique=True, nullable=False)
    status = db.Column(db.String(10), default='available')  # FR-02: Borrowing books

class Member(db.Model):
    id = db.Column(db.Integer, primary_key=True)
    email = db.Column(db.String(120), unique=True, nullable=False)  # FR-11: User authentication

traceability.notes: Search functionality needs to be implemented.
Borrowing functionality needs to be implemented.
Reservation functionality needs to be implemented.
View loans functionality needs to be implemented.
Adding new books functionality needs to be implemented.
Updating book records functionality needs to be implemented.
Marking books as borrowed or returned functionality needs to be implemented.
Managing overdue items functionality needs to be implemented.
Preventing borrowing limit functionality needs to be implemented.
Sending notifications functionality needs to be implemented.
Logging actions functionality needs to be implemented.
Removing books functionality needs to be implemented.
Performance requirements need to be addressed.
Usability is mentioned in the README.

limitations: Functionality for searching, borrowing, reserving, and managing books is not yet implemented.
